DeadMansRichesRule.Rule1: Dead Man's Riches is a 5-reel, 3-row video slot featuring travelling Wild symbols with increasing multipliers.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

DeadMansRichesRule.Rule4: A bet line win in cash is equal to the value shown in the"Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
DeadMansRichesRule.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
DeadMansRichesRule.SymbolRules1: Wild Red Skull symbol, Wild Blue Skull symbol and Wild Captain symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
DeadMansRichesRule.FreeSpinFeatureRule1: Scatter symbol does not appear during free spins.
DeadMansRichesRule.ScatterBuyBetRule1: Current Bet Size and Bet Level will not be affected by the Scatter Buy Bet.
DeadMansRichesRule.ScatterBuyBetRule2: The Scatter Buy Bet option can be activated and deactivated during the main game.

DeadMansRichesShared.WildRedSkullSymbolDesc: At the start of any respin in Travelling Wild Feature (or at the start of any free spin), any Wild Red Skull symbol from the previous spin will move down in one symbol position (or move out of the reels if it is at the third row of the reels).
DeadMansRichesShared.WildBlueSkullSymbolDesc: At the start of any respin in Travelling Wild Feature (or at the start of any free spin), any Wild Blue Skull symbol from the previous spin will move left in one symbol position (or move out of the reels if it is at the first reel).
DeadMansRichesShared.WildCaptainSymbolDesc1: At the start of any respin in Travelling Wild Feature (or at the start of any free spin), if a Wild Red Skull symbol and a Wild Blue Skull symbol from the previous spin move into the same symbol position, the two symbols will be combined as Wild Captain symbol with the multipliers of two symbols added together (Wild symbol without multiplier is assumed to have x1 multiplier).
DeadMansRichesShared.WildCaptainSymbolDesc2: In the next respin, any Wild Captain symbol from the previous spin will be split into a Wild Red Skull symbol and a Wild Blue Skull symbol, with both symbols carrying the combined multipliers.
DeadMansRichesShared.WildCaptainSymbolDesc3: All line wins involving any Wild symbol with multiplier will be multiplied.
DeadMansRichesShared.TravellingWildFeatureDesc1: During any main game spin, if 1 or more Wild Red Skull symbol and/or Wild Blue Skull symbol appear on the reels, the Travelling Wild Feature is activated after wins are paid.
DeadMansRichesShared.TravellingWildFeatureDesc2: During the Travelling Wild Feature, a respin is awarded with all Wild Red Skull symbol and/or Wild Blue Skull symbol moving on the reels.
DeadMansRichesShared.TravellingWildFeatureDesc3: If there is no Wild Red Skull symbol or Wild Blue Skull symbol on the reels, no respin will be awarded and the Travelling Wild Feature ends.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 3 or more Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: Players may choose to start the Free Spins Feature with: 15 Free Spins, or 8 Free Spins with Persistent Wild Symbols.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: Tap on any selection to begin the free spins with 15 Free Spins, or 8 Free Spins with Persistent Wild Symbols.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc4: If 15 Free Spins are selected, 15 free spins are awarded.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc5: If 8 Free Spins with Persistent Wild Symbols are selected, 8 free spins are awarded, and any Wild Red Skull symbol and/or Wild Blue Skull symbol that move out of the reels will reappear on the top row and/or the 5th reel respectively.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc6: If a total of 2 Wild symbols appear on the reels during the Free Spins Feature, 2 free spins are awarded.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc7: If a total of 4 Wild symbols appear on the reels during the Free Spins Feature, 3 free spins are awarded.
DeadMansRichesShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc8: If a total of 6 Wild symbols appear on the reels during the Free Spins Feature, 5 free spins are awarded.
DeadMansRichesShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
DeadMansRichesShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
DeadMansRichesShared.ScatterBuyBetDesc1: The Scatter Buy Bet option can be activated for each spin which increases the bet amount to the displayed value.
DeadMansRichesShared.ScatterBuyBetDesc2: Activating 1 or more Scatter Buy Bet will guarantee 1 or more Scatter symbols for every spin (excluding Free Spin).
DeadMansRichesShared.ScatterBuyBetDesc3: Current Bet Size and Bet Level will not be affected by the Scatter Buy Bet.
DeadMansRichesShared.ScatterBuyBetDesc4: The Scatter Buy Bet option can be activated and deactivated during the main game.
